tasks.headline: Make the detailed form page for reactor creation
tasks.details: Create a detailed form page for reactor creation in the OT software (fields, validation, layout).

tasks.headline: Make all options visible to users; nothing hidden
tasks.details: Ensure all configuration options are available in the front-end for users; no options should be hidden.

tasks.headline: Make camera/IP nomenclature ready for testing
tasks.details: Standardize camera and IP naming conventions and prepare for testing.

tasks.headline: Integrate all modules with the dashboard and install dashboard for test
tasks.details: Integrate modules with dashboard and deploy a test dashboard instance.

tasks.headline: Make visible difference for front and back side of reactors
tasks.details: Add UI indicators or visuals to clearly show front vs back sides of reactors.

tasks.headline: Add progress indicator list view on the surveying screen
tasks.details: Implement a progress indicator list view on the surveying screen to show task progress.

tasks.headline: Confirm the camera mount with the controller
tasks.details: Verify and confirm the physical camera mount alignment and interaction with the controller.

tasks.headline: API integration
tasks.details: Integrate required APIs into the OTS software and test all endpoints.

tasks.headline: Top-corner label mismatch: shows ‘Reactor’ when Equipment Type = Heat Exchanger
tasks.details: When Equipment Type is set to 'Heat Exchanger', the top-right corner label still shows 'Reactor'. Investigate the UI/mapper that renders the top-corner label, fix mapping or fallback, and add unit tests. Reproduce steps, root cause, and fix.

tasks.headline: Spelling correction: 'Acrylic' misspelled
tasks.details: Fix the spelling of 'Acrylic' across UI forms, dropdowns, templates and exported reports. Search for common misspellings and correct them. Verify translations/localizations if any.

tasks.headline: Remove duplicate 'Equipment name' field (same as Equipment Type)
tasks.details: Remove the 'Equipment name' field from forms and UI where it duplicates 'Equipment Type'. Update backend validation and API contracts if necessary; migrate existing data or provide mapping/cleanup script if required. Coordinate with backend team before deletion.

tasks.headline: Take care of DPD calendar
tasks.details: Manage and update the DPD calendar for Novio Score project.

tasks.headline: Check theme color of Airpay
tasks.details: Review and verify the theme color usage in Airpay UI.

tasks.headline: Check theme color of Airpay
tasks.details: Review and verify the theme color usage in Airpay UI.

tasks.headline: Set production ENV for Remotion (AWS keys & region)
tasks.details: Add Remotion AWS access key, Remotion AWS secret key, and Remotion AWS region to production environment.

tasks.headline: Deploy Lambda function with 540s timeout
tasks.details: Deploy the video-processing Lambda function and set timeout to 540 seconds.

tasks.headline: Deploy sites named 'novio-score' (video)
tasks.details: Deploy the static site(s) with the name 'novio-score' for serving video UI/content.

tasks.headline: Write prod.yml GitHub Action
tasks.details: Create production GitHub Actions workflow (prod.yml) to build and deploy video pipeline.

tasks.headline: Cross-check all static videos in S3 bucket
tasks.details: Verify all static video files are present, correctly named, and accessible in the S3 bucket.

tasks.headline: Handle CSP errors for CDN
tasks.details: Implement Content-Security-Policy error handling and headers for CDN distribution.

tasks.headline: Create S3 bucket for videos
tasks.details: Create and configure a dedicated S3 bucket for storing video assets.

tasks.headline: Map CloudFront to S3 video bucket
tasks.details: Configure CloudFront distribution to use the S3 video bucket as origin and set caching/headers.

tasks.headline: Finalize sheet and lock
tasks.details: Finalize the checklist/spreadsheet and lock it for editing (final version).

tasks.headline: TTS setup
tasks.details: Set up Text-to-Speech (TTS) service/integration for video audio generation.
